webhook-handler.description: Complete webhook handler with signature verification for Next.js App Router
notes: Always verify the stripe-signature header
Use request.text() not request.json() for signature verification
Handle errors gracefully - return 200 even for unknown event types
Use a service client (admin) for Supabase to bypass RLS

checkout-session.description: Create Stripe Checkout session for subscription purchases
notes: Always pass user_id in metadata for webhook handling
Use existing customer ID if available to link subscriptions
customer_email pre-fills the checkout form for new customers
Consider adding allow_promotion_codes: true for discounts

customer-portal.description: Create Customer Portal session for self-service billing management
notes: Configure portal settings in Stripe Dashboard first
Enable retention coupons to reduce churn
Users can update payment methods, view invoices, cancel subscriptions
No custom UI needed - Stripe hosts the portal

meters-api.description: Usage-based billing with Stripe Meters API v2
notes: Always use idempotencyKey to prevent duplicate billing
Generate idempotencyKey from the action being billed (e.g., 'api_call_12345')
For high-volume apps, batch events and sync hourly instead of per-request
Listen to v1.billing.meter.error_report_triggered webhook for failed events
Events older than 35 days are rejected
Use payment_behavior: 'default_incomplete' for SCA compliance
Return clientSecret to frontend for payment confirmation
Prefer Checkout for most use cases - it handles more edge cases
Set trial_period_days for trial subscriptions
create_prorations: Adds/removes prorated charges to next invoice
always_invoice: Creates immediate invoice for upgrade charges
none: No proration, change takes effect next billing cycle
For downgrades, consider using 'none' or crediting the difference

proration.description: Handle prorated charges when changing subscriptions mid-cycle
notes: Always preview proration before showing upgrade/downgrade UI
Positive amount = charge, negative = credit
Display the preview to user before confirming the change
Use subscription_proration_date for accurate calculations

trial-subscription.description: Create subscription with trial period (standard or reverse trial)
notes: Reverse trial has higher conversion than standard freemium
Listen to customer.subscription.trial_will_end (3 days before)
Show countdown banner in app during trial period
Collect payment method early with SetupIntent for better conversion

dunning-handler.description: Handle failed payments and dunning (retry) sequences
notes: Stripe Smart Retries recover ~57% of failed payments automatically
Don't lock users out immediately - use 5-7 day grace period
Show in-app banner during grace period linking to Customer Portal
Send dunning emails: Day 0, Day 3, Day 7 (before lockout)
After grace period: Allow read access, block write access

seat-based-billing.description: Per-seat subscription management with quantity updates
notes: Use always_invoice for seat additions to charge immediately
Use create_prorations for removals to credit next invoice
Consider free guests/viewers - only bill for full members
Run nightly sync to catch any missed updates
Show proration preview before confirming seat changes

usage-records.description: Record usage for legacy metered billing (pre-Meters API)
notes: This is the legacy API - prefer Meters API v2 for new implementations
Use increment for cumulative usage, set for absolute values
Always use idempotencyKey to prevent duplicate records
Usage is billed at the end of the billing period
Use for 'Your next bill will be $X' UI messages
Helpful for usage-based billing to show projected costs
Returns 404 if customer has no upcoming invoice
